text: I wake up at six every morning. First, I stretch for five minutes, then drink a glass of water. After a quick shower, I have breakfast—usually oatmeal with fruit. By seven thirty, I start work at my desk. My job involves meetings and emails until lunch. At noon, I take a break and go for a short walk. In the afternoon, I finish tasks and leave at five. Then I exercise for thirty minutes, either jogging or doing yoga at home. Evenings are for cooking dinner, reading a book, or watching a show. I go to bed by ten. This routine keeps me healthy and productive.
